lede: Four Ethereum collections — from Fidenza, the defining Art Blocks release of 2021, to the collector-driven QQL system built with Dandelion Wist.
metric_note: volume figures are OpenSea marketplace volume only — they exclude primary mint proceeds, sales on other venues (Archipelago, Blur, auction houses), and off-marketplace transfers. For Fidenza in particular, which has significant auction-house and alternative-venue history, the true secondary total is materially higher.

collections.name: Fidenza
flags: Art Blocks Curated 78; shares the flagship core contract

collections.name: QQL Mint Pass
flags: supply shrinks as passes are redeemed into QQL artworks

collections.name: QQL
flags: open-ended: minted by redeeming QQL Mint Passes

method: Supply, holder counts, floors, all-time and 30-day volumes: OpenSea API, snapshot 2026-07-03.
USD figures are converted at snapshot spot rates (ETH $1,759.26 — CoinGecko, 2026-07-03) and are indicative only; the ETH figures are primary.
Art Blocks collections (Fidenza, Incomplete Control) share the flagship core contract 0xa7d8…d270; rows are identified by Art Blocks project, not by contract.
Contract addresses verified against Etherscan; mint windows from Art Blocks project records and on-chain first-mint timestamps.
caveats: Secondary volumes are single-venue (OpenSea). Fidenza has substantial history on Archipelago, Blur and at auction (Christie's, Sotheby's) that is not captured here — treat the 69,553 ETH as a floor on true secondary.

Primary mint proceeds have not yet been reconstructed on-chain for these collections (Art Blocks and QQL primary flows route through platform contracts with splits); the primary column is intentionally empty rather than estimated.
QQL and QQL Mint Pass are complementary, not additive: each QQL artwork is minted by burning a pass, so the pass supply (930) shrinks as the artwork supply (342) grows against the original 999.
Holder counts are per-collection and gross — one wallet holding in multiple collections is counted once per collection.
Gondi lending terms are not included in this snapshot.
